My First Blog Post

05 May 2026 • General

Welcome to my new blog!

This is my very first blog post written in Markdown, rendered directly through Astro Content Collections.

I learned that sharing short snippets of knowledge, or “Today I Learned” (TIL) posts, is extremely valuable for building a personal brand. From now on, whenever I solve a tricky bug or learn a new concept, I’ll document it here and share it on LinkedIn.

Code Example

console.log("Hello, Astro!");

Thanks for reading!
